name: Trio Garlic Horseradish Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them into chunks.
2. Boil the potato chunks until they are tender.
3. Drain the boiled potatoes.
4. Add softened butter and milk to taste, then mash the potatoes until smooth.
5. Mix in the horseradish, garlic, and salt.
6. This recipe serves 4 people.
